parameters.content:
## Automated Stripe Payment Recovery: Assign Account Manager for High LTV and coupons for others

### How it works

The workflow triggers on a Stripe payment failure and retrieves contact details.
It queries the payment failures table to check if the client already has a recorded failure.
If a record exists, it increments the failure count; otherwise, it creates a new entry in the table.
The workflow evaluates the client's lifetime value (LTV) and checks if they have already been processed in the system.
High LTV clients receive a newly created Stripe discount coupon via Gmail to encourage retention.
The system also checks for pending tasks, creating new internal tasks and Google Calendar events if none exist.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Configure Stripe credentials for the trigger and coupon creation nodes.
- [ ] Connect the HighLevel account to manage contacts and tasks.
- [ ] Authenticate your chosen data table here it is n8n official data tables.
- [ ] Set up Gmail credentials for sending emails to users.
- [ ] Connect Google Calendar for internal event creation.

### Customization

You can customize the Stripe coupon amount, the criteria used to determine 'high LTV' clients, and the email template sent to them.

## Handle Stripe trigger

Receives the Stripe webhook and fetches associated contact details.

## Query payment failures table

Checks the data table to see if a failure record already exists for the client.

## Process existing failure record

Increments the failure count for known clients and evaluates their LTV status.

## Process new failure record

Creates a new data table entry for first-time payment failures and evaluates LTV.

## Check for existing pending tasks

Fetches and aggregates current tasks to check if the client already has pending follow-ups.

## Create follow-up task and event for a dedicated account manager

Generates a new internal task, creates a Google Calendar event, and updates the row.

## Generate coupon and send message

Creates a discount coupon in Stripe and sends it to the high LTV client via Gmail.

## Evaluate tasks for new records

Fetches and aggregates tasks for clients with newly created failure records.

## Schedule task for new records

Creates follow-up tasks and calendar events for new payment failure instances.

## Issue coupon for new records

Creates a Stripe coupon and sends a retention email for newly recorded high LTV clients.
